name: A200H
comment: A200H is a 200W moving head fixture, with a luminous flux of 6300 , weighing only 15KG. Features of the A200H include a color wheel (11 colors), rotating gobos (8 removable gobos), 17 fixed gobos, and rotating 8F prisms, supports RDM, optional network and wireless control,  supports DMX or USB software upgrades.
